item.title: CarMax to pay $420K to resolve DOJ allegations over servicemember vehicle repossessions
item.description: CarMax allegedly violated federal law by repossessing servicemembers' vehicles without required court orders, leading to a $420,000 settlement agreeme...

item.title: Volvo recalls over 40,000 electric SUVs worldwide over battery fire concerns
item.description: Volvo is recalling over 40,000 EX30 electric SUVs worldwide due to a battery fire risk. Owners are urged to limit charging to 70% until safety repairs...

item.title: Johnson & Johnson to invest $1B in Pennsylvania manufacturing facility
item.description: Johnson & Johnson announced a $1 billion investment in a Montgomery County, Pennsylvania, cell therapy facility that will yield over 500 manufacturing...

item.title: Walmart customers seeking value drive sales higher
item.description: Walmart posted 5.6% revenue growth in the fourth quarter, led by higher transactions, cooling grocery inflation and record digital penetration.

item.title: Dollar Tree makes an upscale play to fuel sales
item.description: Dollar Tree's expansion into wealthier ZIP codes reflects broader retail trend as inflation drives affluent consumers to discount stores for everyday ...
